violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -Salad bar used for dinner service does not have a sneeze gaurd.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Minimal splatter at interior of both microwaves. -Dust/debris at walk in freezer fans. -Carbon/debris at bottom interior of oven.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Salad bar plates and bowls stored at front table are not covered or inverted. -Plastic silverware at server station is not all faced/food contact surfaces are not well-protected.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Grocery bag of personal food items in server refrigerator.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Basin used under hanging mops approximately half full of water. *Recommended storing individual mop buckets under drying mops OR dumping catch basin daily.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Both sani buckets at back prep area were found with less than 150ppm Quat solutions. *COS-removed one and refreshed the other.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Cookline sanitizers were visibly cloudy.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Spoon laying in shredded cheese at server glass door refrigerator.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Stainless portion cup being used as scoop in green chili and au jus and also at server side croutons.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Ladle at soup still in use after 3pm. (Soup set up at ~10:30-11a.m.)--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Waffle iron left dirty from morning service. -Ice cream scoop and cup had dried food residue at scoop and cup interior .--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris/residue at bottom interior vents of make table. -Dust/debris build up on both black oscillating fans. -Black residue at door seal/gaskets of 4door freezer.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Sauces in cold hold (ice packs in bottom) at table top on cookline were found with temps of 60-62F. -Ranch (on ice) at server side found with temp of 50F. *Products need to be surrounded by the ice, not just sitting on top. Also recommended rearranging so the ice container is not so close to the heat lamp.
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
